---
title: "Tilt Dynamics of Cylinder Information and the Parry Measure on the Golden-Mean Shift"
subtitle: "Ergodic theory and probability"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, ergodic, submitted]
journal: "Journal of Theoretical Probability"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/zero-jitter-information-clocks-parry-gibbs-rigidity"
theorems: 21
featured: false
description: "Exponential tilts of cylinder information close within the one-step Markov family, making tilt dynamics globally linearizable. The Parry measure is characterized as the unique zero-jitter (constant Re..."
---

## Abstract

Exponential tilts of cylinder information close within the one-step Markov family, making tilt dynamics globally linearizable. The Parry measure is characterized as the unique zero-jitter (constant Renyi spectrum) law.

**Keywords:** shifts of finite type, Parry measure, large deviations, thermodynamic formalism, Gibbs measures

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 21 |
| Target journal | Journal of Theoretical Probability |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Ergodic theory and probability |

## Video Explainer

*Video coming soon --- NotebookLM pipeline ready, YouTube upload pending.*

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zero-jitter-information-clocks-parry-gibbs-rigidity)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
